description: Copy these jobs into your ~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json to automate X growth

jobs.name: x-morning-growth
jobs.description: Morning X growth: post content, engage with niche accounts, implement one new growth tactic

payload.message:
Morning X Growth Routine:
1. Run xanalytics snapshot
2. Run xanalytics compare
3. Queue 4-5 new posts for today
4. Implement ONE new growth improvement
5. Start drip loop if not running
6. Log what you did to daily notes

jobs.name: x-content-scout
jobs.description: Content scout: find high-engagement tweets, like viral content, queue reactive posts

payload.message: Run xscout report. Like tweets with 50+ likes. For tweets with 20+ likes, craft a post referencing the same topic. If queue below 3, add new posts.

jobs.name: x-nightly-review
jobs.description: Nightly analytics review and strategy adjustment

payload.message:
Nightly review:
1. Run xgrowth report
2. Run xanalytics compare
3. Identify best/worst post types
4. Log strategy results
5. Queue 2-3 posts for tomorrow morning
6. Propose one new tactic for tomorrow

jobs.name: x-analytics-snapshot
jobs.description: Take X analytics snapshot every 4 hours for tracking

payload.message: Run xanalytics snapshot. Report the numbers.
